info.title: Google Workspace
info.description: This document lists Google Workspace APIs for data protection using Druva inSync.

tags.name: App Management
tags.description: Lists the APIs to get information and perform operations on Google Workspace Apps managed in Druva SaaS Apps.

get.description: Provides the App Connection Status for Google Workspace.

401.description: The request did not include an authentication token or an expired authentication token was supplied.

403.description: Insufficient access rights to the content.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

500.description: The request was not processed due to an internal error on server.

501.description: Requested HTTP method is not implemented.

status.description: Status response code for API. It is 0 (zero) for a success response.

appName.description: The name of the app. G Suite is displayed here.

status.description:
The status of the application.

- 0 - Not configured

- 1 - Configured

- 2 - Not connected

- 3 - Connected

- 4 - Not licensed

lastConfigured.description: The date and time when the app was last configured. Example format - YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ

clientid.description: The Application or Client ID of the App. Example - r5942009-853d-485t-vlo5-28df7cd0d7c8

GSuite.description: Array of dictionary containing app information for specific tenant type

tenantType.name: tenantType
tenantType.description: The name of the App for which the status is required.

CloudAppStatus.description: Example of success response from get CloudApp Status API for GSuite tenant type in request.

BadRequest.description: This response means that the server could not understand the request due to invalid syntax.

Unauthorized.description: Authentication is needed to get the requested response.

Forbidden.description: The request was a legal request, but the server is refusing to respond to it due to insufficient access rights to the content.

GARError.description: Client does not have access rights or permissions to the requested content.

value.message: You do not have permission to access this workload.

NotFound.description: The requested resource could not be found on server.

InternalServerError.description: The request was not processed due to an internal error on server.

NotImplemented.description: Requested HTTP method is not implemented.
